purpose: Starter fixtures for minimal-context retrieval, research-brief discipline, and checkpoint-and-persist workflow.

local_search_targets: where eval fixtures for skills currently live

must_include: project entry document when present
concrete paths tied to each target
a stop_point explaining why more reading is low value
must_not: broad repo wandering unrelated to the targets
returning files without saying why they matter

must_include: missing_context entries for unmatched targets
explicit note that the search stopped after the target could not be grounded
must_not: indefinite widening of the search scope

must_include: context_files listing the files that were inspected
patterns_found describing conventions or structures discovered
missing_context field present even when empty or none
stop_point explaining why additional reading would have low value
must_not: return output that omits any of the four required fields
return a stop_point that is vague or does not explain the stopping rationale
list files in context_files without a corresponding why explanation

must_include: stop_point that states conventions and landing zones are now evidence-backed
a minimal file set directly tied to the two targets
must_not: continue reading files after both targets are grounded in concrete paths
expand scope to unrelated directories once the search targets are resolved
return more than the minimum set of files needed to answer the planning question

must_include: vault_writes field listing each vault path written
each vault_writes entry includes a brief note about what was persisted
vault paths follow the vault/plans/<plan-slug>/discoveries.md or vault/shared/ convention
must_not: omit vault_writes from the returned output
list vault writes without describing their content
write to vault paths outside the vault/plans/ or vault/shared/ directories

must_include: findings written to vault after each exploration batch before starting the next
dated sections appended to discoveries.md rather than replacing prior content
in-memory findings released after vault write so conversation context stays lean
must_not: accumulate all findings in conversation and write to vault only at the end
overwrite previous vault content instead of appending a new dated section
re-read findings from vault back into conversation after persisting them

input.precondition: vault/plans/test-plan/discoveries.md already contains findings for 'skill prompt structure and naming'

must_include: check vault/plans/<plan-slug>/discoveries.md for existing findings before exploring
skip or reduce exploration for targets already covered by vault findings
reference existing vault path instead of re-reading the same files
must_not: ignore existing vault findings and re-explore targets from scratch
fail to check vault before starting exploration
duplicate findings already present in vault
